scriptTitle: Cross-OS cleanup (user temp/caches, trash, package caches, logs+crash dumps)
scriptDesc: Sweep user temp + caches, trash, package-manager caches (apt/dnf/pacman/brew/npm/pnpm/bun/yarn/pip), and rotated/system/user logs + crash dumps. Apply by default; use --dry-run to preview.

messages.modeApply: APPLY mode: changes will be made. Pass --dry-run to preview only.
messages.modeDryRun: DRY-RUN mode: no changes will be made.
messages.categorySkipNoPath: [{cat}] no eligible paths exist on this host -- nothing to do
messages.categoryNeedsYes: [{cat}] destructive category requires --yes (or interactive confirmation). Skipping.
messages.noJqFallback: jq not found -- using bash JSON reader (slower; install jq for speed).
messages.unknownVerb: Unknown subverb '{verb}'. Use one of: run, list-categories, help.
messages.unknownCategory: Unknown category '{cat}' (not in config.categories). Aborting before any deletions.
messages.doneDry: Dry-run complete. {count} item(s), {bytes} would be freed.

subverbs.run: Sweep all enabled categories. Default verb if omitted.
subverbs.list-categories: Print every defined category with label, bucket, destructive flag, and per-OS path globs.

flags.--dry-run: Preview only; no deletions, no package-manager mutations.
flags.--apply: Force apply mode (default; explicit for clarity in CI).
flags.--json: Emit a single JSON object on stdout instead of human-readable rows.
flags.--no-color: Disable ANSI colours in human-readable mode.
flags.--quiet: Suppress per-item locked-path notes (still in manifest).

examples: scripts-linux/run.sh 65 --yes --only trash   # actually empty the trash
